text: Nuno Felix RT @elikowaz : Orban is gone. His successor is a former Fidesz insider and isn’t hostile to Israel. But he’s committed to EU reintegration — and for the Netanyahu government, that’s the whole problem. 1/5 https://twitter.com/elikowaz/status/2043539919457395022/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @elikowaz : 奥尔班下台了。他的继任者是前青民盟内部人士，对以色列并不敌视。但他致力于欧盟的重新整合——而对于内塔尼亚胡政府来说，这正是全部问题所在。1/5 https://twitter.com/elikowaz/status/2043539919457395022/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Saudi Arabia's crude oil sales to China expected to drop by half next month as the Middle East war disrupts flows and drives up prices. - Bloomberg tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 沙特阿拉伯下个月对中国的原油销售预计将减半，因为中东战争扰乱了物流并推高了价格。 - 彭博社推文

text: WarMonitor Ships are not “headed to our country.” They’re avoiding Hormuz, turning around, or just waiting it out. This is disruption, not some instant reroute, and it only shows how fragile the system really is. Trump: We have more oil than Russia and Saudi Arabia put together. Boats are heading to our country empty and will go back full of oil so they do not have to go through Hormuz. They are using us for now, but ultimately that will be corrected. 1/ https://twitter.com/Mylovanov/status/2043567823910269371/video/1 - Tymofiy Mylovanov tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 船只并没有“驶向我国”。它们在避开霍尔木兹海峡，掉头，或者只是在观望。这是一种干扰，而不是什么即时的改道，它只显示了这个系统实际上有多脆弱。特朗普：我们拥有的石油比俄罗斯和沙特阿拉伯加起来还要多。船只正空着驶向我国，并将装满石油返回，这样它们就不必经过霍尔木兹海峡。他们现在是在利用我们，但最终这种情况会得到纠正。1/ https://twitter.com/Mylovanov/status/2043567823910269371/video/1 - Tymofiy Mylovanov 推文

text: Visioner 🇭🇺 Péter Márki-Zay, in an effort to improve relations with Brussels, is unblocking the allocation of a €90 billion loan to Ukraine — Politico. 🔹 At the same time, the future prime minister stated during the pre-election campaign that he opposes supplying Hungarian weapons or finances to Kyiv, and also opposes accelerating Ukraine's accession process to the European Union. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇭🇺 彼得·马尔基-扎伊（Péter Márki-Zay）为了改善与布鲁塞尔的关系，正在解除对乌克兰 900 亿欧元贷款的冻结——Politico。🔹 与此同时，这位未来的总理在竞选期间曾表示，他反对向基辅提供匈牙利的武器或资金，也反对加速乌克兰加入欧盟的进程。推文

McCullough tweet

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇺🇸 Indonesia says it is in talks with the United States over a potential agreement to grant U.S. military aircraft access to its airspace, though no deal has been finalized. U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is expected to meet Indonesian Defense Minister Sjafrie Sjamsoeddin later Monday for further discussions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇺🇸 印度尼西亚表示正在与美国就一项潜在协议进行谈判，以允许美国军用飞机进入其领空，尽管尚未达成最终协议。预计美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯将于周一晚些时候会见印度尼西亚国防部长沙弗里·沙姆苏丁进行进一步讨论。 @wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 Peter Magyar, who won the elections in Hungary, announced that he would negotiate with Putin - in particular, about energy supplies. "We will have to sit down at the negotiating table with the Russian president. The geographical position of neither Russia nor Hungary will change. Our energy dependence on Russia will also remain. We will negotiate" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 在匈牙利大选中获胜的彼得·马扎尔（Peter Magyar）宣布，他将与普京进行谈判——特别是关于能源供应的问题。“我们将不得不与俄罗斯总统坐到谈判桌前。俄罗斯和匈牙利的地理位置都不会改变。我们对俄罗斯的能源依赖也将持续。我们将进行谈判” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Zionist Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich released a preliminary estimate stating that the direct budgetary costs of Operation Roaring Lion -- amounted to approximately NIS 35 billion (about $11.5 billion at current exchange rates)
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 犹太复国主义财政部长比撒列·斯莫特里赫（Bezalel Smotrich）发布了一份初步估计，称“咆哮狮子”行动的直接预算成本约为 350 亿新谢克尔（按当前汇率计算约为 115 亿美元）

text: 🇮🇹 / 🇵🇸 🔻 Italian magazine L'Espresso's cover image: "THE ABUSE The annexation of the West Bank, with soldiers complicit with the settlers. Gaza annihilated. The advance into Lebanon. The border breached in Syria. The war on Iran. Ethnic cleansing and massacres. This is how the Zionist right is shaping Greater Israel". @AlHaqNews
text_zh: 🇮🇹 / 🇵🇸 🔻 意大利杂志《L'Espresso》封面图片：“滥用：约旦河西岸的吞并，士兵与定居者同流合污。加沙被歼灭。向黎巴嫩推进。叙利亚边境被突破。对伊朗的战争。种族清洗和大屠杀。这就是犹太复国主义右翼塑造大以色列的方式”。 @AlHaqNews

text: ⚡️ 🇦🇺 Australia has appointed Lieutenant General Susan Coyle as Chief of Army, marking the first time a woman will lead the army in its history. She is set to take the role in July, replacing Lieutenant General Simon Stuart. The appointment comes amid broader defence leadership changes and efforts to increase female representation within the armed forces. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇦🇺 澳大利亚任命苏珊·科伊尔（Susan Coyle）中将为陆军参谋长，这是该国历史上首次由女性领导陆军。她定于 7 月接任，接替西蒙·斯图尔特（Simon Stuart）中将。此次任命是在更广泛的国防领导层变动以及增加武装部队中女性代表比例的努力背景下进行的。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal: "The 25th Amendment, impeachment, demanding his resignation -- we need to do whatever it takes to remove Trump from office"
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 国会女议员普拉米拉·贾亚帕尔（Pramila Jayapal）：“第 25 条修正案、弹劾、要求他辞职——我们需要不惜一切代价将特朗普赶下台”

text: Former U.S. Secretary of State Antony Blinken: President Trump has taken an off-ramp. Maybe he was tired of all that winning. He's really put himself into a corner over the last few weeks that's going to be very hard to get out of.
text_zh: 美国前国务卿安东尼·布林肯：特朗普总统已经选择了一条下坡路。也许他厌倦了所有的胜利。在过去的几周里，他真的把自己逼进了一个很难走出来的死胡同。

text: Trump on Iran: I don’t care if they come back or not. If they don’t come back, I’m fine.
text_zh: 特朗普谈伊朗：我不在乎他们是否回来。如果他们不回来，我没意见。

text: Reporter: Why did you attack Pope Leo? Trump: I don’t think he’s doing a very good job. He likes crime, I guess. We don’t like a pope who says it’s ok to have a nuclear weapon. We don’t want a pope that says crime is ok. I am not a big fan of Pope Leo.
text_zh: 记者：你为什么要攻击教皇利奥？特朗普：我觉得他干得不怎么样。我猜他喜欢犯罪。我们不喜欢一个说拥有核武器没问题的教皇。我们不想要一个说犯罪没问题的教皇。我不是教皇利奥的粉丝。

text: 🇺🇸 So the “Trump Jesus” post was already made on February 4 by Nick Adams, whom Trump appointed as Special Presidential Envoy for American Tourism, Exceptionalism, and Values. The only difference is that in Nick’s post, the “angel soldier” above Trump looks “normal” (as much as AI slop can look normal), while in Trump’s post it looks more like some “AI demon.” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 所以那个“特朗普耶稣”的帖子早在 2 月 4 日就由尼克·亚当斯（Nick Adams）发布了，特朗普任命他为美国旅游、例外论和价值观总统特别代表。唯一的区别是，在尼克的帖子里，特朗普头顶的“天使士兵”看起来很“正常”（在 AI 垃圾内容能看起来正常的情况下），而在特朗普的帖子里，它看起来更像是一个“AI 恶魔”。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: Iran is in very bad shape. I think they’re very desperate.
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗的情况非常糟糕。我认为他们非常绝望。

text: Reporter: How is the ceasefire holding? Trump: It is holding well.
text_zh: 记者：停火协议执行得如何？特朗普：执行得很好。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Alright 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 好吧 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump posts image portraying himself as Jesus Christ.
text_zh: 特朗普发布了一张将自己描绘成耶稣基督的图片。

text: Trump lashes out at Pope Leo: Pope Leo is WEAK on Crime, and terrible for Foreign Policy. He talks about “fear” of the Trump Administration, but doesn’t mention the FEAR that the Catholic Church, and all other Christian Organizations, had during COVID when they were arresting priests, ministers, and everybody else, for holding Church Services, even when going outside, and being ten and even twenty feet apart. I like his brother Louis much better than I like him, because Louis is all MAGA. He gets it, and Leo doesn’t! I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s OK for Iran to have a Nuclear Weapon. I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s terrible that America attacked Venezuela, a Country that was sending massive amounts of Drugs into the United States and, even worse, emptying their prisons, including murderers, drug dealers, and killers, into our Country. And I don’t want a Pope who criticizes the President of the United States because I’m doing exactly what I was elected, IN A LANDSLIDE, to do, setting Record Low Numbers in Crime, and creating the Greatest Stock Market in History. Leo should be thankful because, as everyone knows, he was a shocking surprise. He wasn’t on any list to be Pope, and was only put there by the Church because he was an American, and they thought that would be the best way to deal with President Donald J. Trump. If I wasn’t in the White House, Leo wouldn’t be in the Vatican. Unfortunately, Leo’s Weak on Crime, Weak on Nuclear Weapons, does not sit well with me, nor does the fact that he meets with Obama Sympathizers like David Axelrod, a LOSER from the Left, who is one of those who wanted churchgoers and clerics to be arrested. Leo should get his act together as Pope, use Common Sense, stop catering to the Radical Left, and focus on being a Great Pope, not a Politician. It’s hurting him very badly and, more importantly, it’s hurting the Catholic Church!
text_zh: 特朗普抨击教皇利奥：教皇利奥对犯罪软弱，外交政策也很糟糕。他谈到对特朗普政府的“恐惧”，但没有提到天主教会和所有其他基督教组织在新冠疫情期间所感受到的恐惧，当时他们逮捕了牧师、神职人员和其他所有人，仅仅因为他们举行教堂礼拜，甚至在去户外、保持十英尺甚至二十英尺距离时也是如此。我比他更喜欢他的兄弟路易斯，因为路易斯是彻头彻尾的 MAGA（让美国再次伟大）。他懂，而利奥不懂！我不想要一个认为伊朗拥有核武器没问题的教皇。我不想要一个认为美国攻击委内瑞拉是可怕之事的教皇，那个国家一直在向美国输送大量毒品，更糟糕的是，他们清空了监狱，包括杀人犯、毒贩和杀手，把他们送进我们的国家。我也不想要一个批评美国总统的教皇，因为我正在做我被选民以压倒性优势选出来要做的事情，即创下犯罪率的历史新低，并创造历史上最伟大的股市。利奥应该心存感激，因为众所周知，他是一个令人震惊的惊喜。他不在任何教皇候选名单上，教会之所以选他，只是因为他是美国人，他们认为这是应对唐纳德·J·特朗普总统的最佳方式。如果我不在白宫，利奥就不会在梵蒂冈。不幸的是，利奥对犯罪软弱，对核武器软弱，这让我很不舒服，他与大卫·阿克塞尔罗德（David Axelrod）这样的奥巴马同情者会面也让我很不舒服，大卫·阿克塞尔罗德是一个来自左翼的失败者，他就是那些想要逮捕教堂信徒和神职人员的人之一。利奥应该作为教皇端正自己的行为，运用常识，停止迎合激进左翼，专注于成为一位伟大的教皇，而不是政客。这对他伤害很大，更重要的是，这正在伤害天主教会！

text: 🇵🇱 💬 🇭🇺 The Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk is confident that Warsaw and Budapest will have "exceptionally good" relations with the new government. He noted that political changes in Hungary are important both for bilateral relations and for the situation in Europe as a whole, including previously blocked decisions on financing Ukraine. Tusk reported that he has already had a conversation with Peter Magyar, congratulated him on his victory and discussed his upcoming visit to Warsaw, which he previously called the destination of his first foreign trip. Tusk also added that the results of the elections in Hungary demonstrate the volatility of politics and are a "signal for those who do not believe in their own strength". 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇵🇱 💬 🇭🇺 波兰总理唐纳德·图斯克（Donald Tusk）相信华沙和布达佩斯将与新政府建立“极其良好”的关系。他指出，匈牙利的政治变革对于双边关系和整个欧洲的局势都很重要，包括此前被封锁的关于资助乌克兰的决定。图斯克报告说，他已经与彼得·马扎尔进行了交谈，祝贺他获胜，并讨论了他即将对华沙进行的访问，他此前曾称华沙为他首次出访的目的地。图斯克还补充说，匈牙利的选举结果证明了政治的波动性，是“给那些不相信自己力量的人的一个信号”。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 🇨🇳 The Philippines says Chinese maritime vessels dumped cyanide near the BRP Sierra Madre outpost at Ayungin Shoal in the West Philippine Sea, based on chemical tests from multiple incidents between 2025 and 2026. Officials say yellow bottles retrieved from small wooden boats tested positive for cyanide, warning the substance could harm military personnel, marine life, and coral reefs. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 🇨🇳 菲律宾表示，根据 2025 年至 2026 年间多次事件的化学测试，中国海警船只在西菲律宾海的 Ayungin 浅滩的 BRP Sierra Madre 前哨基地附近倾倒了氰化物。官员们表示，从小型木船上回收的黄色瓶子检测出氰化物呈阳性，并警告称该物质可能伤害军事人员、海洋生物和珊瑚礁。 @wfwitness

text: 📢 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 Trump: "I'm very disappointed in NATO. They weren't there for us. We pay trillions of dollars for NATO and they weren't there for us... I think that's going to be under very serious examination." 📎 Rapid Response 47
text_zh: 📢 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 特朗普：“我对北约非常失望。他们没有支持我们。我们为北约支付了数万亿美元，而他们却没有支持我们……我认为这将受到非常严肃的审查。” 📎 快速反应 47

text: 📢 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 Trump on Pope Leo XIV: "I don't think he's doing a very good job. He likes crime, I guess... I'm not a big fan of Pope Leo. He's a very liberal person — and he's a man that doesn't believe in stopping crime." 📎 Rapid Response 47
text_zh: 📢 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 特朗普谈教皇利奥十四世：“我不认为他干得很好。我猜他喜欢犯罪……我不是教皇利奥的粉丝。他是一个非常自由派的人——而且他是一个不相信阻止犯罪的人。” 📎 快速反应 47

text: Today (April 12), Hezbollah published a total of 60 statements regarding recent operations targeting Israel and the IDF in Israel and southern Lebanon, up from 46 on April 11. This brings their total stated operations since the beginning of the war to 1,711, with an average of 40.74 per day since March 2. Note: Hezbollah only announces a small fraction of the total operations carried out against the IDF, and often combines multiple attacks into one statement. This graph only counts total Hezbollah statements.
text_zh: 今天（4 月 12 日），真主党共发布了 60 份关于近期针对以色列和以色列国防军在以色列及黎巴嫩南部行动的声明，高于 4 月 11 日的 46 份。这使得自战争开始以来他们声称的行动总数达到 1,711 次，自 3 月 2 日以来平均每天 40.74 次。注意：真主党只宣布了针对以色列国防军所进行行动的一小部分，并且经常将多次袭击合并为一份声明。此图表仅统计真主党的声明总数。
